binance_trc20.label: Crypto (USDT/USDC — TRC20)
binance_trc20.instructions: Send exact amount to address above. Include your Order ID in the memo field.

bank_transfer.label: Bank Transfer (IBAN)
bank_transfer.instructions: Use your company name as transfer reference.

cliq.label: CliQ (Arab Bank)
cliq.instructions: Send via CliQ using alias SOCROOT. Include Order ID in notes.

paypal.label: PayPal
paypal.instructions: Use Goods & Services option. Include Order ID in notes.
